findings.evidence: <main> at line 27 contains another <main> at line 34. Only one <main> landmark is valid per document.

findings.description: Digital signature metadata block inserted into the memorandum header layout between the 'From' and 'Subject' fields, which is not visually present in the PDF rendering.
findings.evidence: PDF page 1 goes directly from 'Solid Waste Section' to 'Subject: Meeting Officer's Report'. The HTML inserts 'Digitally signed by LYF / DN: cn=LYF, o=DWM, ou=SWS, email=larry.frost@ncdenr.gov, c=US / Date: 2016.05.12 12:11:52 -04:00' between those elements, adding content to the visual layout that a PDF reader would not see.

findings.description: The handwritten/digital signature image of Larry Frost that appears in the PDF memo header is missing from the HTML. There is no corresponding tag for the signature, though the digital signature metadata text is reproduced.
findings.evidence: PDF page 1 shows a visible handwritten signature next to 'From: Larry Frost, Engineer'. The HTML includes the digital signature metadata text (DN, date, etc.) but has no tag representing the signature image itself.
